mano_cua.result_summary: react-pdf 库项目，无 dev 命令。test 目录有 vite 测试页面但依赖 portal:../ 协议（yarn 3 专用）。yarn 3 install 失败（patch TypeError: isDate is not a function），npm 不支持 portal: 协议。无法安装依赖。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: react-pdf library project. No dev command at root. Test dir has vite test page but uses portal:../ dependency (yarn 3 only). Yarn 3 install fails with patch TypeError. npm doesn't support portal: protocol. Cannot install dependencies.
